allow: Bash(git init && git remote add origin git@github.com:sr-gene/gene-wezterm.git)
Bash(git add CLAUDE.md README.md wezterm-macos.lua wezterm-windows.lua zshrc-macos.sh)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Initial commit: cross-platform WezTerm config and shell setup

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(git branch -M main && git push -u origin main)

Bash(git add install-windows.ps1 && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add Windows install script for WezTerm config

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git push)
